topics.name: Builder / Orchestration
topics.purpose: System/build execution: architecture changes, automation delivery, code and infra runbooks.
topics.routingPolicy: Route builder-mode intents here by default. Do not post human commitments/planning unless tied to build execution decisions.
topics.notifyPolicy: Immediate for blockers and merge-ready outcomes; batched for routine implementation logs.

topics.name: Operations
topics.purpose: Human-domain execution support: priorities, commitments, follow-ups, reminders, and operational planning.
topics.routingPolicy: Route tulsday-mode intents here by default. Escalate builder-only technical implementation requests to Builder / Orchestration.
topics.notifyPolicy: Immediate for deadlines, blockers, and owner ambiguities; scheduled digests for routine updates.

topics.name: General
topics.purpose: Legacy catch-all topic from early pilot phase.
topics.routingPolicy: Do not use for new work. Migrate traffic to Builder / Orchestration or Operations based on owner mode.
topics.notifyPolicy: No routine notifications. Only migration reminders when usage is detected.
topics.deprecatedReason: Deprecated to prevent context drift and wrong-topic posting caused by ambiguous catch-all routing.
